---
pagetitle: "Presentations — Richard Aubrey White"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="page">
<div class="mast"><div>
<p class="kick">Talks &amp; Symposia</p>
<h1 class="name">Presentations</h1>
<p class="sub">Invited talks at scientific conferences and symposia</p>
</div></div>

<div class="yearLabel">2026</div>
<div class="preItem"><p class="preVenue">NordicEpi/NorPEN Conference (Tromsø)</p><p class="preTitle">The long shadow of COVID-19 on sick leave and primary healthcare consultations in Norway<a class="preLink" href="presentations/2026-06-long-shadow-of-covid-19-on-sick-leave-and-primary-healthcare-consultations-in-norway.pdf">[ PDF ]</a></p></div>

<div class="yearLabel">2025</div>
<div class="preItem"><p class="preVenue">Norwegian Covid Association (Norsk Covidforening)</p><p class="preTitle">The Consequences of COVID-19 and Long Covid<a class="preLink" href="https://covidforeningen.no/Nordisk_Webinar2025_uten_teksting/Nordisk_Webinar2025_Engelsk">[ Webinar ]</a></p><p class="preNote">Richard's session: "Healthcare usage and sick leave in 2023" — part of a Nordic webinar with Lisa Norén, Arne Søraas and Gunhild A. Nyborg.</p></div>

<div class="yearLabel">2024</div>
<div class="preItem"><p class="preVenue">Leve med ME — podcast</p><p class="preTitle">Long covid: the invisible health crisis few talk about<a class="preLink" href="https://shows.acast.com/leve-med-me/episodes/leve-med-me-long-covid">[ Podcast ]</a></p><p class="preNote">Conversation on what long covid means for individuals and society, and why healthcare workers, teachers and families are especially exposed.</p></div>
<div class="preItem"><p class="preVenue">Norges Myalgisk Encefalopati Forening</p><p class="preTitle">Helsetjenestebruk og sykefravær i 2023 sammenlignet med trender før pandemien i Norge</p><iframe class="preVid" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Bbg9hd5q2XY" title="YouTube video" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe></div>
<div class="preItem"><p class="preVenue">Nasjonal kompetansetjeneste for CFS/ME</p><p class="preTitle">Traces of COVID-19 on primary healthcare consultations and medically certified sick leave in 2023<a class="preLink" href="presentations/2024-11-traces-of-covid-19-on-primary-healthcare-consultations-and-medically-certified-sick-leave-in-2023.pdf">[ PDF ]</a></p></div>
<div class="preItem"><p class="preVenue">Uppsala University</p><p class="preTitle">Practical data management for modern open science<a class="preLink" href="presentations/2024-10-practical-data-management-for-modern-open-science.pdf">[ PDF ]</a></p></div>
<div class="preItem"><p class="preVenue">R/Medicine</p><p class="preTitle">org + plnr: Packages for organized project material and effective analysis<a class="preLink" href="presentations/2024-06-org-plnr-packages-for-organized-project-material-and-effective-analysis.pdf">[ PDF ]</a></p></div>

<div class="yearLabel">2023</div>
<div class="preItem"><p class="preVenue">Northern European Symposium on Automated Surveillance</p><p class="preTitle">Core Surveillance 9 as a framework for real-time analysis and disease surveillance, using NorSySS as an example<a class="preLink" href="presentations/2023-12-core-surveillance-9-as-a-framework-for-real-time-analysis-and-disease-surveillance.pdf">[ PDF ]</a></p></div>
<div class="preItem"><p class="preVenue">Ukrainian Symposium on Syndromic Surveillance</p><p class="preTitle">The role of statistics in syndromic surveillance<a class="preLink" href="presentations/2023-07-the-role-of-statistics-in-syndromic-surveillance.pdf">[ PDF ]</a></p></div>

<div class="foot"><span class="mail"><a href="mailto:hello@rwhite.no">hello@rwhite.no</a></span><div class="links"><a href="https://github.com/raubreywhite">GitHub</a><a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=75oKEWoAAAAJ">Scholar</a><a href="https://no.linkedin.com/in/richard-white4">LinkedIn</a></div></div>
</div>
```
